tasks.title: Project Setup and Repository Structure
tasks.description: Initialize the project repository with proper structure, safety documentation, and development environment setup
tasks.details: Create GitHub repository with branching strategy (main/develop/feature branches). Set up directory structure: /firmware (Zephyr RTOS), /ros2_ws (ROS 2 Humble workspace), /simulation (Ignition Fortress), /hardware (CAD/schematics), /docs (safety plan, BOM, testing protocols). Initialize CI/CD pipeline with automated testing. Create safety documentation including emergency procedures, RF compliance verification plan, and flight test protocols. Set up development environment with Docker containers for consistent builds across team members.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify repository structure completeness, validate CI/CD pipeline with dummy commits, review safety documentation with supervisor, confirm all team members can clone and build successfully

subtasks.title: Repository Initialization with Branching Strategy
subtasks.description: Initialize Git repository with main/develop/feature branching strategy, set up branch protection rules, and configure merge policies for collaborative development
subtasks.details: Create repository structure with protected main branch, develop branch for integration, feature branch naming conventions, and set up PR templates and merge requirements

subtasks.title: Directory Structure Creation for All Components
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive directory structure for firmware, ROS2 packages, simulation environments, hardware documentation, and project documentation
subtasks.details: Establish organized folder hierarchy: /firmware (STM32/ESP32 code), /ros2_ws (ROS2 workspace), /simulation (Gazebo/AirSim), /hardware (schematics/PCB), /docs (technical documentation)

subtasks.title: CI/CD Pipeline Setup with Automated Testing
subtasks.description: Configure GitHub Actions/GitLab CI pipeline for automated building, testing, and deployment of firmware, ROS2 packages, and simulation components
subtasks.details: Set up workflows for cross-compilation, unit testing, integration testing, static code analysis, and automated hardware-in-the-loop testing where applicable

subtasks.title: Safety Documentation Creation
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive safety documentation including emergency procedures, RF compliance documentation, flight protocols, and regulatory compliance materials
subtasks.details: Document emergency shutdown procedures, RF transmission safety, flight area restrictions, battery handling protocols, failsafe mechanisms, and regulatory compliance (FCC/CE)

subtasks.title: Docker Development Environment Configuration
subtasks.description: Set up Docker containers for consistent development environment across team members, including ROS2, simulation tools, and cross-compilation toolchains
subtasks.details: Create Dockerfiles for ROS2 Humble, Gazebo simulation, ARM cross-compilation toolchain, and development tools. Include docker-compose for multi-container orchestration

tasks.title: DWM3001CDK Hardware Setup and Initial Testing
tasks.description: Configure 5x DWM3001CDK modules and establish basic UWB communication
tasks.details: Flash factory firmware on all 5 DWM3001CDK modules. Set up 4 anchors with fixed positions in lab environment (minimum 3m spacing for good geometry). Configure 1 tag module. Implement basic ranging test using built-in TWR functionality to validate hardware operation. Use USB-C PD power banks for anchor power. Set up serial logging infrastructure to capture ranging data. Verify RF output compliance using Keysight N6705B analyzer. Create anchor mounting solution using tripods with precise positioning.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate ranging accuracy between all anchor-tag pairs (<50cm error in controlled environment), verify RF power output compliance with RSS-220, confirm stable power delivery from USB-C banks, test serial communication reliability

subtasks.title: Firmware flashing for all 5 modules
subtasks.description: Flash appropriate firmware to all UWB modules (4 anchors + 1 tag) ensuring proper version compatibility and configuration
subtasks.details: Use DWM3000 development tools to flash firmware to each module. Verify successful flashing and basic connectivity. Document firmware versions and configurations used.

subtasks.title: Anchor positioning and mounting system setup
subtasks.description: Design and implement physical mounting system for 4 anchor modules with precise positioning measurements
subtasks.details: Create mounting brackets or stands for anchors. Measure and document exact 3D coordinates of each anchor position. Ensure stable mounting that won't shift during operation.

subtasks.title: Tag module configuration
subtasks.description: Configure the mobile tag module with proper settings for TWR ranging and data collection
subtasks.details: Set up tag module parameters including ranging intervals, power settings, and communication protocols. Configure data logging and transmission capabilities.

subtasks.title: Basic TWR ranging validation
subtasks.description: Perform initial Two-Way Ranging tests between tag and anchors to validate distance measurements
subtasks.details: Test ranging accuracy at known distances. Verify all anchor-tag pairs can perform TWR successfully. Document ranging performance and identify any problematic configurations.

subtasks.title: RF compliance testing with equipment
subtasks.description: Conduct RF emissions and compliance testing using spectrum analyzer or similar test equipment
subtasks.details: Test RF output power levels, frequency compliance, and spurious emissions. Ensure system operates within regulatory limits for UWB band. Document test results and compliance status.

subtasks.title: Power system integration with USB-C power banks
subtasks.description: Integrate USB-C power banks for portable operation and validate power consumption and battery life
subtasks.details: Connect USB-C power banks to anchor and tag modules. Measure power consumption under various operating modes. Test battery life and validate portable operation capabilities.

tasks.title: Zephyr RTOS Firmware Development for TDoA
tasks.description: Develop custom Zephyr RTOS firmware for anchor synchronization and TDoA measurement
tasks.details: Implement master-slave wireless synchronization protocol: master anchor broadcasts sync beacon every 100ms with precise timestamp, slave anchors receive and calculate clock offset using propagation delay correction. Develop anchor firmware with continuous RX listener task that timestamps incoming tag blinks. Implement tag firmware with 20Hz periodic blink transmission (ID + sequence number). Use Zephyr's device tree and Kconfig for module configuration. Implement packet structure: sync packets (master->slaves), blink packets (tag->all anchors), and timestamp packets (anchors->ground station). Add packet validation, sequence number tracking, and basic error handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Measure clock synchronization accuracy using logic analyzer (target: σ ≤ 2ns), validate 20Hz tag blink rate stability, test packet loss rates under various interference conditions, verify anchor timestamp precision

subtasks.title: Define packet structure and validation system
subtasks.description: Design and implement the communication packet structures for TDoA ranging with validation mechanisms
subtasks.details: Create packet definitions for anchor-tag communication, implement CRC validation, define message types for sync/blink/response, and establish packet parsing/serialization functions

subtasks.title: Setup Zephyr device tree and Kconfig configuration
subtasks.description: Configure Zephyr RTOS build system and hardware abstraction for TDoA ranging devices
subtasks.details: Define device tree overlays for radio peripherals, configure Kconfig options for TDoA functionality, set up build targets for anchor and tag devices, and establish hardware pin mappings

subtasks.title: Implement master-slave synchronization protocol
subtasks.description: Develop the timing synchronization protocol between master anchor and slave anchors
subtasks.details: Implement master beacon transmission, slave anchor synchronization reception, time offset calculation and correction, and maintain synchronized time base across anchor network

subtasks.title: Develop anchor RX listener task with timestamping
subtasks.description: Create receive task for anchors to capture tag blinks with precise timestamps
subtasks.details: Implement interrupt-driven RX handler, high-precision timestamp capture using hardware timers, packet filtering and validation, and timestamp buffering for TDoA calculations

subtasks.title: Create tag blink transmission firmware
subtasks.description: Implement tag firmware for periodic blink transmission with sequence tracking
subtasks.details: Develop periodic blink transmission scheduler, implement sequence number management, power optimization for battery operation, and transmission timing randomization to avoid collisions

subtasks.title: Implement wireless synchronization with propagation delay correction
subtasks.description: Develop advanced synchronization accounting for RF propagation delays and clock drift
subtasks.details: Calculate and compensate for RF propagation delays, implement clock drift correction algorithms, maintain synchronization accuracy over time, and handle dynamic network topology changes

subtasks.title: Implement error handling and sequence tracking
subtasks.description: Create robust error handling and packet sequence management for reliable operation
subtasks.details: Implement packet loss detection and recovery, sequence number validation and duplicate detection, timeout handling for missed packets, and system health monitoring with error reporting

tasks.title: UWB TDoA Solver Implementation
tasks.description: Implement TDoA-based position solver with Chan least-squares and Kalman filtering
tasks.details: Implement Chan's method for initial TDoA position estimate using least-squares optimization. Add Nelder-Mead refinement for improved accuracy. Develop 6-state constant velocity Kalman filter (position XYZ, velocity XYZ) for temporal smoothing. Handle anchor geometry validation and GDOP calculation. Implement outlier detection using RANSAC or similar robust estimation. Add support for 5-anchor configuration with redundancy handling. Create ROS 2 node 'uwb_solver' that subscribes to raw TDoA measurements and publishes geometry_msgs/PoseWithCovarianceStamped at 50Hz. Include proper error propagation and covariance matrix calculation.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate solver accuracy with synthetic TDoA data (known positions), test with 4 and 5 anchor configurations, measure computation time (must achieve 50Hz), verify Kalman filter convergence and stability

subtasks.title: Implement Chan's method least-squares solver
subtasks.description: Develop the core Chan's algorithm for initial position estimation using least-squares approach with hyperbolic positioning
subtasks.details: Implement Chan's two-step weighted least squares algorithm for TDOA-based positioning. Include matrix operations for hyperbolic positioning equations, handle singular matrix cases, and implement proper weighting schemes for measurement uncertainties.

subtasks.title: Develop Nelder-Mead optimization refinement
subtasks.description: Implement Nelder-Mead simplex algorithm to refine initial position estimates from Chan's method
subtasks.details: Create Nelder-Mead optimizer with adaptive parameters for position refinement. Include convergence criteria, step size adaptation, and proper objective function definition using TDOA residuals. Handle optimization bounds and local minima issues.

subtasks.title: Develop 6-state Kalman filter
subtasks.description: Implement extended Kalman filter for tracking position and velocity states with proper process and measurement models
subtasks.details: Design 6-state EKF (x, y, z, vx, vy, vz) with constant velocity motion model. Implement prediction and update steps, handle non-linear measurement equations, tune process and measurement noise covariance matrices, and include proper state initialization.

subtasks.title: Implement anchor geometry validation and GDOP calculation
subtasks.description: Develop geometric dilution of precision calculation and anchor configuration validation for positioning accuracy assessment
subtasks.details: Calculate GDOP values based on anchor geometry and target position. Implement geometric validation checks for anchor placement, detect poor geometric configurations, and provide positioning accuracy estimates. Include visualization tools for anchor layout assessment.

subtasks.title: Implement RANSAC outlier detection
subtasks.description: Develop RANSAC algorithm for robust outlier detection and removal in TDOA measurements
subtasks.details: Implement RANSAC consensus algorithm for identifying and rejecting outlier TDOA measurements. Include adaptive threshold selection, minimum sample set selection, and consensus evaluation. Handle dynamic outlier rates and integrate with positioning solver.

subtasks.title: Integrate ROS 2 node with error propagation
subtasks.description: Develop ROS 2 node wrapper with proper message handling, parameter management, and uncertainty propagation throughout the positioning pipeline
subtasks.details: Create ROS 2 node with proper topic subscriptions/publications, parameter server integration, and service interfaces. Implement error propagation from TDOA measurements through solver to final position estimates. Include proper logging, diagnostics, and real-time performance monitoring.

tasks.title: ROS 2 Bridge and Data Pipeline
tasks.description: Develop ROS 2 integration layer for UWB data streaming and processing
tasks.details: Create 'uwb_bridge' ROS 2 node that interfaces with DWM3001CDK modules via serial/USB. Implement custom message types for TDoA measurements (UWBTDoA.msg with anchor_id, timestamp, tag_id). Set up tf2 transforms for anchor positions in world frame and tag position updates. Integrate with robot_localization package for EKF fusion. Configure message synchronization to handle multiple anchor data streams. Add diagnostic publishing for link quality, packet loss rates, and timing statistics. Implement proper ROS 2 lifecycle management for anchor connection handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify 50Hz data streaming reliability, validate message synchronization accuracy, test graceful handling of anchor disconnections, confirm tf2 transform tree correctness, measure end-to-end latency from UWB measurement to ROS topic

subtasks.title: Serial/USB interface bridge development
subtasks.description: Develop a ROS 2 node that bridges the serial/USB communication with the TDoA positioning system hardware
subtasks.details: Create a ROS 2 node using rclpy or rclcpp that handles serial communication with TDoA hardware. Implement proper error handling, reconnection logic, and data parsing from the positioning system. Include configuration parameters for baud rate, port selection, and timeout values.

subtasks.title: Custom message type definition for TDoA data
subtasks.description: Define custom ROS 2 message types for TDoA positioning data transmission
subtasks.details: Create .msg files defining the structure for TDoA positioning data including timestamp, tag ID, anchor positions, distance measurements, and calculated position coordinates. Generate the message interface package with proper dependencies and export configurations.

subtasks.title: tf2 transform setup for anchor and tag positions
subtasks.description: Configure tf2 transform tree for anchor and tag coordinate frame management
subtasks.details: Set up tf2 static and dynamic transforms for anchor positions in the environment coordinate frame. Implement transform broadcasting for tag positions based on TDoA calculations. Configure proper parent-child relationships in the transform tree.

subtasks.title: robot_localization package integration
subtasks.description: Integrate TDoA positioning data with robot_localization package for sensor fusion
subtasks.details: Configure robot_localization EKF or UKF nodes to fuse TDoA positioning data with other sensors (IMU, odometry). Set up proper covariance matrices, sensor configurations, and coordinate frame mappings. Implement data conversion between custom TDoA messages and standard ROS 2 localization messages.

subtasks.title: Diagnostic publishing with lifecycle management
subtasks.description: Implement diagnostic publishing and lifecycle node management for the TDoA positioning system
subtasks.details: Create diagnostic publishers for system health monitoring including signal quality, anchor connectivity, and positioning accuracy metrics. Implement lifecycle node management with proper state transitions (inactive, active, error recovery). Add parameter validation and runtime reconfiguration capabilities.

tasks.title: Jetson Orin Sensor Integration and EKF Fusion
tasks.description: Integrate IMU, depth camera, and barometer data with UWB through robot_localization EKF
tasks.details: Set up Jetson Orin Nano with Ubuntu 22.04 and ROS 2 Humble. Configure ICM-42688-P IMU driver for high-rate acceleration/gyroscope data. Set up Intel RealSense D435i with realsense-ros package for depth and visual odometry. Configure robot_localization EKF node to fuse: UWB pose (50Hz), IMU accel/gyro (400Hz), barometer altitude from flight controller via MAVROS. Tune EKF parameters for indoor flight characteristics. Implement sensor health monitoring and automatic reconfiguration if sensors fail. Add optional RPLiDAR A1 integration for 360-degree obstacle detection if budget allows.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate EKF convergence with static positioning (σ ≤ 5cm), test dynamic accuracy during manual drone movement, verify sensor fusion improves accuracy over UWB-only solution, measure computational load on Jetson (target: <50% CPU usage)

subtasks.title: Jetson Orin Ubuntu/ROS 2 setup
subtasks.description: Set up Ubuntu and ROS 2 environment on Jetson Orin for drone sensor integration
subtasks.details: Install Ubuntu on Jetson Orin, configure ROS 2 Humble distribution, set up development environment with necessary build tools and dependencies for sensor integration work

subtasks.title: ICM-42688-P IMU driver configuration
subtasks.description: Configure and integrate ICM-42688-P IMU sensor driver for attitude and motion sensing
subtasks.details: Install ICM-42688-P driver, configure I2C/SPI communication, calibrate sensor axes and offsets, implement ROS 2 publisher for IMU data with proper coordinate frame transforms

subtasks.title: Intel RealSense D435i integration with visual odometry
subtasks.description: Integrate Intel RealSense D435i camera for depth sensing and visual odometry
subtasks.details: Install RealSense SDK and ROS 2 wrapper, configure camera parameters, implement visual odometry pipeline using depth and RGB data, tune VIO parameters for drone flight conditions

subtasks.title: robot_localization EKF configuration and tuning
subtasks.description: Configure and tune Extended Kalman Filter for sensor fusion using robot_localization package
subtasks.details: Set up robot_localization EKF node, configure sensor input mappings (IMU, visual odometry), tune process and measurement noise parameters, validate fusion accuracy through testing

subtasks.title: Sensor health monitoring implementation
subtasks.description: Implement monitoring system for sensor health and data quality validation
subtasks.details: Create diagnostics nodes for IMU and camera health monitoring, implement data quality checks (missing data, outliers, latency), set up alerts and failsafe mechanisms for sensor failures

subtasks.title: Optional RPLiDAR integration
subtasks.description: Integrate RPLiDAR for additional ranging and obstacle detection capabilities
subtasks.details: Install RPLiDAR driver and ROS 2 package, configure serial communication, implement scan data processing for obstacle detection, integrate with existing sensor fusion pipeline if beneficial

tasks.title: Holybro Quadrotor Assembly and PX4 Integration
tasks.description: Assemble Holybro quadrotor platform and integrate with PX4 flight stack
tasks.details: Assemble Holybro Kakute H743 flight controller with 3-inch carbon frame, motors, and ESCs. Flash PX4 v1.15 firmware with custom parameters for indoor flight. Set up MAVROS bridge for ROS 2 communication. Configure safety systems: RC failsafe to DISARM, software geofence boundaries, emergency stop protocols. Install prop guards and optimize weight distribution to stay under 250g total. Set up 2-cell LiPo power system with voltage monitoring. Create custom mounting solution for Jetson Orin, UWB tag, and sensors. Implement MAVROS position control interface to accept external position estimates from EKF.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify total weight <250g with all payloads, test RC failsafe response time (<200ms to DISARM), validate MAVROS position control accuracy in manual flight, confirm stable hover with external position feedback, measure flight time with full payload

subtasks.title: Mechanical Assembly with Weight Optimization
subtasks.description: Complete physical assembly of quadrotor frame, motors, propellers, and core components with focus on weight distribution and center of gravity optimization
subtasks.details: Assemble quadrotor frame, install motors and ESCs, mount propellers, optimize component placement for balanced weight distribution, calculate and verify center of gravity, document final weight and balance measurements

subtasks.title: PX4 Firmware Setup and Parameter Configuration
subtasks.description: Install and configure PX4 flight controller firmware with appropriate parameters for the specific quadrotor configuration
subtasks.details: Flash PX4 firmware to flight controller, configure airframe parameters, calibrate sensors (accelerometer, gyroscope, magnetometer), tune PID controllers, set up radio control parameters, configure flight modes

subtasks.title: MAVROS Bridge Setup for ROS 2 Communication
subtasks.description: Establish communication bridge between PX4 flight controller and ROS 2 system using MAVROS for autonomous control capabilities
subtasks.details: Install MAVROS package for ROS 2, configure MAVLink communication protocol, set up serial/USB connection to flight controller, test bidirectional communication, verify topic publishing and subscription

subtasks.title: Safety System Configuration
subtasks.description: Configure comprehensive safety systems including failsafe mechanisms, geofencing, and emergency stop procedures
subtasks.details: Set up return-to-launch (RTL) failsafe, configure low battery failsafe, establish geofence boundaries, implement emergency stop procedures, configure manual override capabilities, test all safety mechanisms

subtasks.title: Power System Setup with Monitoring
subtasks.description: Install and configure power distribution system with real-time monitoring capabilities for voltage, current, and battery status
subtasks.details: Install power distribution board, connect battery monitoring sensors, configure voltage and current sensing, set up low voltage warnings, implement power consumption logging, calibrate power monitoring system

subtasks.title: Custom Mounting Solution for Payloads
subtasks.description: Design and implement modular mounting system for various payloads while maintaining flight stability and safety
subtasks.details: Design payload mounting brackets, ensure secure attachment points, verify weight limits and balance constraints, create modular interface for different payload types, test mounting system with various payloads, document payload integration procedures

tasks.title: Ignition Gazebo Simulation Environment
tasks.description: Create high-fidelity simulation environment with custom UWB noise modeling
tasks.details: Set up Ignition Fortress with custom world file matching lab environment dimensions (5m x 5m x 3m). Implement custom UWB sensor plugin with realistic noise modeling (Gaussian 0-mean, σ=0.05m), multipath effects, and packet loss simulation. Create accurate drone model matching Holybro platform with proper inertial properties and sensor configurations. Add movable obstacle objects (foam pillars, dynamic barriers). Implement domain randomization: anchor position drift, communication dropouts, varying obstacle speeds, lighting changes. Set up gym-gazebo2 interface for RL training with action space as body-frame velocity setpoints and observation space including UWB positions, IMU data, and depth images.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate simulation physics accuracy against real drone behavior, verify UWB noise model produces realistic error patterns, test domain randomization parameter ranges, confirm RL interface properly controls simulated drone, measure simulation real-time factor (target: >1.0x)

subtasks.title: Create Ignition Fortress world matching lab environment
subtasks.description: Develop a simulation world in Ignition Fortress that accurately replicates the physical lab environment dimensions, lighting, and static features
subtasks.details: Design and implement world file with correct scale, lighting conditions, floor textures, and static obstacles matching the real lab setup. Include proper material properties and visual appearance.

subtasks.title: Develop custom UWB sensor plugin with realistic noise modeling
subtasks.description: Create a custom Ignition plugin that simulates UWB ranging sensors with realistic noise characteristics and propagation models
subtasks.details: Implement UWB sensor plugin with distance measurement capabilities, multipath effects, NLOS conditions, and realistic noise models based on real UWB sensor specifications. Include proper ROS2 message publishing.

subtasks.title: Develop accurate drone model with proper physics
subtasks.description: Create a high-fidelity drone model with realistic flight dynamics, motor characteristics, and sensor mounting
subtasks.details: Implement drone URDF/SDF with accurate mass properties, motor dynamics, aerodynamic effects, and sensor placement. Include proper control interfaces and realistic flight behavior.

subtasks.title: Implement movable obstacle system
subtasks.description: Create dynamic obstacles that can be moved during simulation to test navigation robustness
subtasks.details: Develop movable obstacle models with collision detection, physics properties, and control interfaces. Include scripted movement patterns and manual control capabilities.

subtasks.title: Setup domain randomization system
subtasks.description: Implement domain randomization for lighting, textures, obstacle positions, and sensor noise to improve sim-to-real transfer
subtasks.details: Create randomization framework that varies simulation parameters including lighting conditions, material properties, obstacle configurations, and sensor characteristics during training episodes.

subtasks.title: Develop gym-gazebo2 RL interface
subtasks.description: Create OpenAI Gym interface for the simulation environment to enable RL training with standard algorithms
subtasks.details: Implement gym-gazebo2 wrapper with proper observation space (UWB measurements, drone state), action space (velocity commands), reward function, and episode management. Include proper reset and step functions.

tasks.title: ORCA Reactive Obstacle Avoidance Baseline
tasks.description: Implement ORCA-based reactive collision avoidance as baseline and RL fallback
tasks.details: Implement Optimal Reciprocal Collision Avoidance (ORCA) algorithm for multi-agent collision avoidance. Create ROS 2 node that subscribes to local position and obstacle detections (from RealSense/LiDAR), computes collision-free velocity using ORCA constraints. Add goal-directed navigation using artificial potential fields or RRT* for path planning. Implement confidence monitoring system that switches between RL policy and ORCA when RL confidence <0.6. Add dynamic obstacle tracking using Kalman filters for moving objects. Create safety layer that enforces minimum clearance distances (≥0.5m) and emergency stop conditions. Test in simulation environment with various obstacle configurations.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate collision avoidance in static obstacle courses (100% success rate), test dynamic obstacle scenarios, measure reaction time to sudden obstacles (<200ms), verify goal-reaching capability while avoiding obstacles, confirm smooth transitions between RL and ORCA modes

subtasks.title: Implement Core ORCA Algorithm for Multi-Agent Collision Avoidance
subtasks.description: Develop the fundamental ORCA (Optimal Reciprocal Collision Avoidance) algorithm for computing collision-free velocities in multi-agent environments
subtasks.details: Implement velocity obstacle computation, reciprocal collision avoidance calculations, and optimal velocity selection. Include support for circular agents with radius-based collision detection and velocity constraints.

subtasks.title: Develop Goal-Directed Navigation Using Potential Fields or RRT*
subtasks.description: Create path planning system that guides agents toward goals while avoiding obstacles using either potential field methods or RRT* algorithm
subtasks.details: Implement attractive forces toward goals, repulsive forces from obstacles, and path smoothing. Alternative: implement RRT* for optimal path planning with dynamic replanning capabilities.

subtasks.title: Build Confidence Monitoring System for RL/ORCA Switching
subtasks.description: Design and implement a confidence assessment system that determines when to switch between RL and ORCA control modes
subtasks.details: Develop metrics for RL performance confidence, environmental complexity assessment, and decision logic for mode switching. Include hysteresis to prevent rapid switching between modes.

subtasks.title: Implement Dynamic Obstacle Tracking with Kalman Filters
subtasks.description: Create obstacle detection and tracking system using Kalman filters to predict dynamic obstacle movements for improved collision avoidance
subtasks.details: Implement Kalman filter for position and velocity estimation, obstacle association and tracking, and prediction of future obstacle states. Include handling for new obstacle detection and track management.

subtasks.title: Develop Safety Layer with Minimum Clearance Enforcement
subtasks.description: Implement final safety layer that enforces minimum clearance distances and overrides unsafe commands from higher-level planners
subtasks.details: Create safety monitoring system that continuously checks for minimum clearance violations, implements emergency stop procedures, and provides safe velocity commands when violations are detected. Include collision prediction and avoidance maneuvers.

tasks.title: PPO RL Training with Sim-to-Real Transfer
tasks.description: Train PPO reinforcement learning policy for obstacle avoidance and implement sim-to-real transfer
tasks.details: Implement PPO (Proximal Policy Optimization) using Stable-Baselines3 framework. Design reward function combining goal approach, obstacle avoidance, and flight efficiency. Set up training pipeline with parallel environments for sample efficiency. Implement progressive curriculum learning starting with simple obstacles and increasing complexity. Add domain randomization during training: UWB noise variations, sensor failures, wind disturbances, obstacle dynamics. Create policy evaluation metrics and automated testing suite. Implement sim-to-real transfer techniques: robust policy training, sensor noise adaptation, reality gap mitigation. Deploy trained policy on real hardware with confidence monitoring and ORCA fallback integration. Target >95% success rate in simulation and demonstrate collision-free real flight through obstacle course.
tasks.testStrategy: Achieve >95% success rate in simulation over 1000 test episodes, validate policy performance across different obstacle configurations, measure real-world transfer success rate, confirm zero collisions in real flight tests, verify end-to-end latency ≤200ms from perception to control action

subtasks.title: PPO implementation using Stable-Baselines3
subtasks.description: Implement Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm integration with Stable-Baselines3 framework for drone control
subtasks.details: Set up PPO agent configuration, hyperparameter tuning, and integration with drone environment. Configure policy and value networks, learning rates, and training parameters specific to drone control tasks.

subtasks.title: Reward function design and tuning
subtasks.description: Design and implement comprehensive reward functions for drone navigation and control tasks
subtasks.details: Create reward structures for altitude control, position tracking, obstacle avoidance, and energy efficiency. Implement reward shaping techniques and balance exploration vs exploitation.

subtasks.title: Parallel training environment setup
subtasks.description: Configure parallel training environments to accelerate learning and improve sample efficiency
subtasks.details: Set up vectorized environments, multi-processing training pipeline, and distributed computing setup. Implement environment synchronization and data collection mechanisms.

subtasks.title: Progressive curriculum learning implementation
subtasks.description: Implement curriculum learning strategy with progressive difficulty increase during training
subtasks.details: Design curriculum stages from simple hover tasks to complex navigation scenarios. Implement automatic difficulty progression based on performance metrics and learning progress.

subtasks.title: Domain randomization during training
subtasks.description: Implement domain randomization techniques to improve policy robustness and generalization
subtasks.details: Randomize physics parameters, environmental conditions, sensor noise, and actuator dynamics during training. Configure randomization ranges and schedules for optimal sim-to-real transfer.

subtasks.title: Policy evaluation and testing framework
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive evaluation framework for trained policies with standardized metrics
subtasks.details: Implement evaluation protocols, performance metrics, statistical analysis tools, and automated testing procedures. Create benchmark scenarios and success criteria for policy assessment.

subtasks.title: Sim-to-real transfer techniques implementation
subtasks.description: Implement techniques to bridge the simulation-to-reality gap for successful policy transfer
subtasks.details: Implement system identification, adaptive control techniques, online fine-tuning mechanisms, and safety constraints for real-world deployment. Handle sensor calibration and actuator differences.

subtasks.title: Real hardware deployment with confidence monitoring
subtasks.description: Deploy trained policies on real drone hardware with safety monitoring and confidence estimation
subtasks.details: Implement real-time policy execution, safety monitors, confidence estimation, fallback controllers, and emergency protocols. Set up telemetry logging and performance monitoring on physical hardware.
